title: United States Cattle Inventory Down 1 Percent
summary: There were 101 million head of cattle and calves on U.S. farms as of July 1, 2021, according to the Cattle report published today by the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS).

title: KUAC Wraps Up Fiscal Year 2021: Here’s Our Highlights!
summary: Thanks to you, KUAC successfully pulled through Fiscal Year 2021! As we concluded our Fiscal Year 2021 on June 30, we paused to reflect on how your contributions helped us achieve our goals.
